translations: for Us We will surely, guide them
puzzle.hint: This verse connects the effort made for God's sake with His promise of guidance and support for the righteous.
puzzle.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَـٰهَدُوا۟ فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَمَعَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allāh is with the doers of good.
